_note: Slug -> recursive.eco grammar UUID (the deckId) for the Kali/Paradevi channel. Used by recursive.eco to bind repo grammars to their live rows and to build per-deck links. _public_now lists the slugs that are is_public=true on recursive.eco (only public grammars import as channel members). Keep this updated when new grammars are created. Mirrors recursive-tarot/tarot/_eco_ids.json shape.
_preview_links: Every grammar already renders, no extra hosting needed (Jul 3 2026, PLAN-trip-polish-sync-v2.md A.1). Swap <id> for the UUID from `ids`. Play/read + Edit are on the APP (flow.recursive.eco); Cards/Study/Tree/Thumbnails are on the LANDING viewers (recursive.eco), not flow. Play = https://flow.recursive.eco/play?id=<id> | Edit = https://flow.recursive.eco/create/dashboard/unified/new?id=<id> | Cards = https://recursive.eco/pages/grammar-viewer.html?type=custom&id=<id> | Study = https://recursive.eco/pages/study-viewer.html?type=custom&id=<id> | Tree = https://recursive.eco/pages/tree-viewer.html?type=custom&id=<id> | Thumbnails = https://recursive.eco/pages/grammar-viewer.html?type=custom&id=<id>&layout=thumbnails
